channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:
Email received 14.04.26 0900 Again overflowing

Dog poo bag on pavement opposite number 40 Cromwell road thanks for sorting

Mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Fridge, 14th April
item.description:
Fridge dumped on street by bus stop. Already difficult to wait at stop at peak times due to the volume of cars at mechanic shop and chicken shop. Dirty bins , high pile of tyres and now a fridge. Clean this are up please or make the shop owners do it . People who frequent these places don’t care about others . The hey park their cars on pavement then dump the box of chicken bones on the pavement .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chinese Temple has no bins, 14th April
item.description:
Hello, I'm on the RTA at Paradise Park apartments. The chinese temple has no bins of its own, so either uses ours, or worse, dumps rubbish in the street, attracting vermin. How do we get them thier own bins please?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lea Bridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Looks like insulation, 14th April
item.description:
Dumped on the grass in the middle of Kingsholm Gardens.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsholm Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on Bush Rd x Sheep Ln corner, 14th April
item.description:
Mattress and furniture dumped on the corner of Bush Road and Sheep Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beck Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged pavement due to illegal parking, 14th April
item.description:
Car drivers collecting chicken often completely block pavement and constant traffic keeps damaging walk way making it dangerous to Pedestrians especially elderly and people with poor sight . Council have been told about this and chose to ignore

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bermondsey Street / Morocco Street corner, 14th April
item.description:
Multiple bags of rubbish have been left on the pavement, with food and liquid leaking out across the ground. This is creating a strong, unpleasant smell and is attracting further mess. The situation is not only unhygienic but also makes the entire area look very neglected and unpleasant for residents and passersby. As shown in the attached images, the waste is spreading and worsening, and requires urgent attention. I would be grateful if this could be cleared as soon as possible and appropriate action taken to prevent this from happening again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Bermondsey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 14th April
item.description:
Dead fox by gates to priest lands park allotments
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Longlands Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Red Cross Way, 14th April
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left on Redcross Way in the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Southwark Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th April
item.description:
I just witnessed the most flagrant fly tipping in Hackney at the location above. A woman, as you can see from behind in the photo, dumped a huge amount of rubbish at this bin. Please can someone look through the rubbish, find her details, and fine her.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone habitually puts their rubish in front of my house blocking the access to the pavement, 14th April
item.description:
Someone puts their rubbish in front of my house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
